proof:
unfold p0ProjectionResidualSq2 constApproxError2 cellAverage2
nlinarith [sq_nonneg (c - (u0 + u1) / 2), sq_nonneg (u0 - u1)]

unfold weightedP0Average
rw [← Finset.sum_div, ← mul_div_assoc]
congr 1
rw [Finset.mul_sum]
apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
intro i _
ring

unfold weightedP0Residual weightedP0Average
rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ => by ring : ∀ i ∈ s, m i * (u i - (∑ j ∈ s, m j * u j) / (∑ j ∈ s, m j)) = m i * u i - m i * ((∑ j ∈ s, m j * u j) / (∑ j ∈ s, m j)))]
rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
field_simp

obtain ⟨hLeftW, hRightW⟩ := laxFriedrichsWeights_nonneg cfl hcflLower hcflUpper
unfold laxFriedrichsStep
calc |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight|
    ≤ |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft| + |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| := abs_add_le _ _
  _ = laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft| + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * |uRight| := by
      rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg hLeftW, abs_of_nonneg hRightW]
  _ ≤ laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * M + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * M := by
      apply add_le_add
      · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hLeft hLeftW
      · exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRight hRightW
  _ = (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl) * M := by ring
  _ = M := by rw [laxFriedrichsWeights_sum]; ring

unfold heatLeftWeight heatCenterWeight heatRightWeight
constructor
· exact hr0
constructor
· linarith
· exact hr0

unfold vec2InfNorm diag2First diag2Second
apply max_le
· rw [abs_mul]
  have hx : |x| <= vec2InfNorm x y := abs_left_le_vec2InfNorm x y
  have hn : 0 <= vec2InfNorm x y := vec2InfNorm_nonneg x y
  calc |a| * |x| <= rho * |x| := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ha (abs_nonneg x)
    _ <= rho * vec2InfNorm x y := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hx hrho
· rw [abs_mul]
  have hy : |y| <= vec2InfNorm x y := abs_right_le_vec2InfNorm x y
  calc |b| * |y| <= rho * |y| := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hb (abs_nonneg y)
    _ <= rho * vec2InfNorm x y := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hy hrho

unfold finiteRowApply
simp only [← Finset.sum_mul, hsum, one_mul]

unfold centeredSignal finiteMean finiteDC
rw [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
field_simp
